# Extracao: transcription_mp4_4__Why_Leads_Do_Not_Convert

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_4__Why_Leads_Do_Not_Convert.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

79% of all leads never convert and it's due to a lack of lead nurturing as the common cause. Now what does that mean? It means nobody's following up, nobody's nurturing the lead. Did you really think that somebody was gonna hit your website or call you or visit you and just say okay I'm done I'm gonna buy? Only 2% of all transactions are done on the first visit. To nurture a lead means what? It means how do you nurture a relationship or nurture your children? How do you nurture anything? You pay attention to it. You give it care okay? Maybe it's a back rub. Maybe it's something different for everyone. Maybe it's time with your kids to read a book. With a customer it could be something completely different. Probably won't be a back rub and it probably won't be reading a book. Maybe it's a personal visit or a text or sending them a link or some information. It's nurturing. You understand it's creating a relationship. A man once told me the only difference between a contact and a contract was the R and the R he told me stood for relationship. That's what I'm talking about when I'm talking about lead nurturing. 79% never convert. Why? Because there's no nurturing. There's no follow-up. This is your opportunity. This is the holy grail and the way that you can separate yourself from everyone else in the marketplace. Increase your margins, increase your closing ratios and mostly increase your penetration on the market.
